zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Boteler於1189年出生在英國藍卡爾貝福時，她的父親Thomas Boteler Lord of Warrington19歲，母親Mrs Thomas Boteler19歲。她於1216年與William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Boteler于1189年出生在英国藍卡爾貝福时，她的父亲Thomas Boteler Lord of Warrington19岁，母亲Mrs Thomas Boteler19岁。她于1216年与William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Boteler was born in 1189, in Bewsey, Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas Boteler Lord of Warrington, was 19 and her mother, Mrs Thomas Boteler, was 19. She married William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley in 1216, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Boteler est née en 1189, à Bewsey, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Boteler Lord of Warrington, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Boteler, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley en 1216, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

Sie hat 1216 in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Botelerが1189年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイで生まれた時，父Thomas Boteler Lord of Warringtonは19歳，母Mrs Thomas Botelerは19歳であった。1216年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでWilliam Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Boteler(이)가 1189년 영국 랭카실르 브w시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Boteler Lord of Warrington(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Boteler(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Boteler родилась в 1189 г. в местности бюси, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Boteler Lord of Warrington было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Boteler, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley в 1216 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.
